nasb.text: So when Joab came to the king and told him, he called for Absalom. Thus he came to the king and prostrated himself on his face to the ground before the king, and the king kissed Absalom.

esv.text: Then Joab went to the king and told him, and he summoned Absalom. So he came to the king and bowed himself on his face to the ground before the king, and the king kissed Absalom.

cnv.text: 於是約押進去見王，把這事告訴了他，王就召見押沙龍。押沙龍進去見王，在王面前臉伏在地拜他，王就與押沙龍親吻。

ccb.text: 约押就去见王，把押沙龙的话告诉他，王便召见押沙龙。押沙龙来到王面前俯首叩拜，王就亲吻他。
